title: Char1ie's Backrooms
body:
![Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/FFTVTHFj/NEWBANNERTHING.png) **

Char1ie's Backrooms is a Resource Pack that aims to bring the popular internet concept "The Backrooms" to Minecraft. This pack is my best work here on CurseForge so I hope you enjoy the Pack!** ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96439f855040bfc7f5678c4177a258570fbfbb82.png) ![Level 0 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/v8pn0kV6/lv0.png) ![Level 0 Part 2 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/zvpv0Yky/lv0-2.png) ![Level 0 Part 3 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/rsgsQ29z/lv0-3.png) ![Level 1 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/Gtztqnjp/lv1.png) ![Level 2 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/Wb6jBCKN/lv2.png) ![Level 2 Part 2 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/1XMXJ1KW/lv2-2.png) ![Level 3 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/dQ9hqGKP/lv3.png) ![Level 4 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/MHtHdJYd/lv4.gif) ![Level 5 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/Wb6jBCKr/lv5.png) ![Level 37 Features](https://i.postimg.cc/CLHY3Xtk/lv37.png) ![Level Fun Features](https://i.postimg.cc/8kb71LVg/lvfun.png) ![Level Run Features](https://i.postimg.cc/xjPX0LS8/lvrun.png) ![The End Features](https://i.postimg.cc/L4VJHjMP/theend.png) ![Manila Room Features](https://i.postimg.cc/3JC7sV6B/manilaroom.png) ![Misc Level Features](https://i.postimg.cc/VsFJYXcJ/misclvs.gif) ![Miscellaneous Features](https://i.postimg.cc/ry9D85L0/misc.png)

^^ images also in the gallery! **

AS WELL AS A SPECIAL CUSTOM BACKROOMS LANGUAGE!** Go to your Language settings and scroll around until you find this: ![Language Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cbfb5ec0e05d6296a1292e37afa5be8afc974fb_0.webp)

Then select it and once it's done loading all blocks re-textured to look like The Backrooms are now also NAMED as they should in The Backrooms! **

IF YOU HAVE ANY (and I mean any) SUGGESTIONS, [COMMENT ON CURSEFORGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/char1ies-backrooms/comments) AND I WILL SEE IT!**

PLANNED: **

PLANNED:**

More Level 0 wall drawings

Wet Liminal Carpet

Maybe a few touch-ups to old/random textures now and then.

AND MORE (You'll have to wait and see!)

-----------------------------------

Entities are not coming to the pack for the very simple reason that you cannot change the model of an entity without using mods! If I ever wanted to in the future, I would make it a seperate pack that you can have ontop of this pack. But I have no plans to make something like that right now. **

Don't expect regular updates except to keep it up to date with MC updates, although I don't doubt there will be more updates.** _

if you'd like to use assets from this pack in a custom map, let me know about it and please credit the pack somewhere somewhat obvious, like a description or credits area. But do not use these assets in your own pack or mod._ **

Made by TeamChar1ie (me)** **

Check out my other projects [Here](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)!**
